page.title: Platform Accounts
page.subtitle: Administer global platform identities, ownership, capabilities, and lifecycle state.
page.placeholder: Platform Account business flows are intentionally not implemented yet.

generatedCode.label: System code
generatedCode.description: Account code will be generated by the system after create.

placeholders.ownerSearch: Search owners for the selected owner kind

referenceHelp.ownerId: Choose an owner from the list for the selected owner kind.

states.emptyMessage: No records match the current query.
states.loadErrorTitle: Platform account data could not load
states.loadErrorMessage: Retry the request or adjust the current filters.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search account code, display name, handle, or profile URL

detail.archivedReadOnly: Archived platform accounts are read-only. Backend detail remains viewable when available.

related.unavailable: No safe related route is available.

create.title: Create platform account
create.subtitle: Creates a global account record using documented identity and owner fields.

edit.title: Edit platform account
edit.subtitle: Updates mutable display and locator fields only.

transferOwnership.title: Transfer ownership
transferOwnership.subtitle: Changes the owner through the dedicated transfer route.

capabilities.title: Update capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Sends exactly the three platform capability flags.

validation.invalidToken: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens as required by this field.
validation.locatorRequired: At least one locator is required.

confirm.deactivate: Deactivate this platform account? Backend blockers may still reject the request.
confirm.archive: Archive this inactive platform account? Backend archiving forces all capability flags off.
